title: OpenAI Added The chat-latest API Snapshot Alias
summary: OpenAI added the chat-latest API snapshot alias for testing the latest chat improvements, with an underlying model snapshot that can update over time.

evidence_refs.license_note: Official changelog reviewed for factual metadata; no provider prose copied.

impacts.recommended_action: Use chat-latest only where floating model behavior is acceptable; pin production workflows to stable model IDs when repeatability matters.

detail.fallback_policy: Underlying snapshot may update over time; OpenAI's changelog points production users toward stable model choices.

limitations: APW records alias behavior only; it does not assert the current underlying model snapshot, quality, latency, or production suitability.
